title: Impromptu, To Miss Ainslie.
content:
Fair maid, you need not take the hint,
            Nor idle texts pursue:-
        'Twas guilty sinners that he meant,
            Not angels such as you!
meaning:
"Impromptu, To Miss Ainslie." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
